# [T1 thread-create+tool-call] Use execute-tool...
Folder: cron

user: [T1 thread-create+tool-call] Use execute-tool with toolName='tool-help' and instanceId='hermes' to list available tools. Check that the result contains a non-empty tools array and that each tool has a name and description. End your reply with STEP_OK if everything worked, or FAILED: <reason> if anything was wrong.
assistant: 
tool: 
assistant: Result contains a non-empty tools array with 25 tools on the first page. Each tool has both a name and description field. The tools array is properly structured with entries like:

- agent_ai-stream_ws-provider_models_GET (description: "Returns all available AI models...")
- agent_text-to-speech_POST (description: "Convert text to natural-sounding speech...")
- ai-run (description: "Delegate a task to a specialist AI agent...")

All tools have the required name and description fields.

STEP_OK
